nasb.text: Then He brought them out with silver and gold, And among His tribes there was not one who stumbled.

esv.text: Then he brought out Israel with silver and gold, and there was none among his tribes who stumbled.

cnv.text: 他領自己的子民帶著金銀出來； 他們眾支派中沒有一個畏縮的。

ccb.text: 祂带领以色列人携金带银地离开埃及， 各支派中无人畏缩。

csbs.text: 他领他的子民带着金银出来， 他的众支派中没有绊倒的。
